alfalfa-microgreens.name: Alfalfa Microgreens
alfalfa-microgreens.nutrition: Rich in vitamins K, C, and minerals like calcium, potassium, iron, and zinc
description: Delicate, mild, and slightly nutty in flavor. Alfalfa microgreens are perfect for dishes like sandwiches, salads, wraps, smoothies, grain bowls, and yogurt-based meals.
These tiny greens are nutrient dense and rich in vitamins, along with essential minerals like calcium, potassium, iron, and zinc, making them a powerful addition to everyday nutrition.
about: Alfalfa microgreens are young shoots of the alfalfa plant harvested early when their nutritional concentration is at its peak. Known for their mild flavour, crisp texture, and subtle nutty taste, these microgreens are an easy addition to everyday meals.

Their gentle flavor makes them ideal for layering into meals where you want added nutrition without overpowering the taste. They also complement paneer/meat dishes, lemon-based preparations, and yogurt bowls, adding freshness and a slight crunch.
Because of their high mineral and enzyme content, alfalfa microgreens are particularly suitable for light summer meals such as cold or warm salads, buttermilk, and refreshing detox smoothies.

At Microgreens de Manikonda, our Alfalfa microgreens are grown in controlled environments using RO water and non-GMO seeds, ensuring freshness, safety, and optimal nutrient density. They are harvested and delivered fresh to preserve both flavor and nutritional value.

healthBenefits: High in vitamin K for bone health
alfalfa-microgreens.storage: Store in refrigerator in a sealed container for up to 7 days
